    Serialized Form

    • Package it.polimi.Network.Common

      • Class it.polimi.Network.Common.ActionMessage

        class ActionMessage extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • maxPlayers
            int maxPlayers
            Number of players requested when creating a room.
          • nickname
            String nickname
            The nickname of the player sending the action.
          • pin
            String pin
            The secret PIN provided by the player for secure connection/reconnection.
          • roomID
            int roomID
            The ID of the room the player is trying to join/create or is currently in.
          • type
            String type
            The type of action being requested (e.g., "LOGIN", "CHAT", "PLAY_CARD").
          • value
            int value
            An optional numeric payload associated with the action (e.g., card index).

      • Class it.polimi.Network.Common.SerializedUpdate

        class SerializedUpdate extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • content
            String content
            The text payload or serialized state associated with the update.
          • success
            boolean success
            A flag indicating whether the update represents a successful action or an error/rejection.
          • type
            String type
            The classification of the update (e.g., "LOGIN_RESULT", "STATUS_UPDATE", "NOTIFICATION").

      • Class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiGameService
